rationale: The citing paper is an fMRI-based brand-image profiling study (template-based neural profiles), while the cited paper evaluates whether neurophysiological measures (especially fMRI ventral striatum) improve prediction of TV ad elasticities, so the overlap appears conceptual (value of neural measures) rather than clearly methodological. With only a single DOI match and no in-text citation context in the provided evidence, there is not enough signal to confidently classify this as either clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
